tests.label: CFT-001-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Creates a new file with overwrite=false when the file does not pre-exist. Verifies the operation succeeds and returns true.
tests.notes: Unique timestamped file name guarantees the file does not pre-exist. Uses overwrite=false on a new file which should succeed.

tests.label: CFT-002-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Creates a file and then creates it again with overwrite=true. Verifies both calls succeed and no exception is thrown.
tests.notes: Both calls should return true. The second call silently overwrites the file.

tests.label: CFT-003-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Invokes the deprecated 3-parameter createHPCCFile overload (no lzAddress). Verifies it delegates to the 4-parameter version with lzAddress=null and returns true in a containerized environment.
tests.notes: Skipped on non-containerized clusters. Validates backward compatibility of the deprecated API.

tests.label: CFT-004-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes lzAddress=null explicitly with the 4-parameter signature in a containerized environment. Verifies DestNetAddress is omitted from the request and the server accepts the call.
tests.notes: Skipped on non-containerized clusters. Distinct from AcreateHPCCFile because it is an explicit null-address test without environment branching.

tests.label: ECT-001-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Uses a fileName containing a subdirectory path component. Verifies the method handles path separators without throwing an unexpected exception.
tests.notes: Outcome (true/false/exception) depends on whether the subdirectory pre-exists on the LZ. Test passes as long as no unchecked exception escapes.

tests.label: ECT-002-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Uses a fileName with no file extension. Verifies the server does not enforce an extension requirement and the file is created successfully.
tests.notes: Tests that the server accepts plain file names without an extension.

tests.label: ECT-003-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Uses a fileName containing hyphens and underscores. Verifies common separator characters are accepted by the server.
tests.notes: Hyphens and underscores are valid POSIX filename characters and should be accepted.

tests.label: ECT-004-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes an empty string as lzAddress. Verifies the client treats it identically to null and does not include DestNetAddress in the request.
tests.notes: Client code: if (lzAddress != null && !lzAddress.isEmpty()). Empty string is explicitly excluded, same as null. Only valid on containerized.

tests.label: ECT-005-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Uses a fileName of 255 characters to test the upper boundary of file system and server name length limits. Verifies no unchecked exception escapes.
tests.notes: Both true/false and expected exception types are acceptable outcomes. Test passes if no unchecked exception escapes.

tests.label: ECT-006-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Uses a single-character fileName ("x") to test the minimal lower boundary of the DestRelativePath field. Verifies the server accepts it.
tests.notes: A single ASCII character is a valid filename on all supported platforms.

tests.label: EHT-001-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes null as fileName. Verifies the client throws an Exception with a message containing 'fileName required' before making any network call.
tests.notes: Client-side validation fires before any network call. No server contact should occur.

tests.label: EHT-002-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes empty string as fileName. Verifies the client throws an Exception with a message containing 'fileName required' before any network call.
tests.notes: Empty string triggers the same client-side guard as null.

tests.label: EHT-003-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes null as targetLandingZone. Verifies the client throws an Exception with a message containing 'targetLandingZone required' before any network call.
tests.notes: targetLandingZone is validated before fileName in the current implementation.

tests.label: EHT-004-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes empty string as targetLandingZone. Verifies the client throws an Exception with a message containing 'targetLandingZone required'.
tests.notes: Empty string triggers the same client-side guard as null for targetLandingZone.

tests.label: EHT-005-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Creates a file then attempts to create the same file again with overwrite=false. Verifies the second call returns false, reflecting the server response 'Failure: <path> exists.'
tests.notes: First call uses overwrite=true to ensure the file exists. Represents the most common user error. Pre-condition failure skips via Assume.

tests.label: EHT-006-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes a fileName of '.' which resolves to the landing zone base directory. Verifies the server returns a failure result and the method returns false or throws an ESP exception.
tests.notes: Behaviour depends on how the HPCC server resolves '.' relative to the drop zone base path. Both false return and ESP exception are valid outcomes.

tests.label: EHT-007-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes a targetLandingZone that does not correspond to any configured drop zone. Verifies either an ArrayOfEspExceptionWrapper is thrown or the method returns false.
tests.notes: No silent success allowed. Documents whether the server returns a 'Fail...' result string or raises an ESP exception via validateDropZoneAccess.

tests.label: EHT-008-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Passes an unreachable lzAddress (RFC 5737 TEST-NET 192.0.2.1). Verifies the server surfaces an error with no silent success. Only meaningful for bare-metal deployments.
tests.notes: Skipped on containerized clusters. DestNetAddress is only used in baremetal mode for routing to the drop zone node.

tests.label: CNT-001-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Confirms the createHPCCFile endpoint is reachable and the method returns true for a minimal valid request against a live cluster.
tests.notes: Complements the generic ping() connectivity test with a method-specific connectivity check.

tests.label: CNT-002-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Calls createHPCCFile using a client configured with invalid credentials. Verifies an authentication-related exception is thrown or the method does not return true.
tests.notes: Skipped when doesTargetHPCCAuthenticate() returns false. Test passes if exception is thrown OR method returns false — must not return true.

tests.label: CNT-003-createHPCCFile
tests.description: Calls createHPCCFile on a secured HPCC cluster using valid credentials. Verifies the permission check passes and the method returns true.
tests.notes: Skipped when doesTargetHPCCAuthenticate() returns false. Validates the HPCC permission grant path for FILE_IO_URL.
